_meta.purpose: Regression baseline — known-correct values for Express Garage Door Service. Every audit run is validated against this. Any field that drifts triggers a warning + auto-disables that finding from the voiceover.
groundTruthSources: Chris's screenshots showing live GBP knowledge panel

pageLoadSeconds.tolerance: load times vary by network; flag if outside this band

website.h1Text: Best Garage Door Services Culver City
website.title: Garage Door Services Culver City

serviceAreaPagesCount.tolerance: may grow over time as Express adds locations

daysSinceLastReview.tolerance: value increases ~1/day as time passes; expect to drift up

lastPostDaysAgo.tolerance: Express posts at least monthly per screenshot

knownFailureModes.symptom: All GBP fields null + h1='' + overlap=0%
knownFailureModes.cause: Google CAPTCHA / anti-bot block triggered by too many scrapes in one session
Search knowledge panel didn't load — either block screen, no business match, or layout change
knownFailureModes.fix: Confirm fresh chrome-profile-search-kp; if persists, Google changed DOM

knownFailureModes.cause: OLD bug: extractor was hitting review snippets or wrong elements. photoCount is DISABLED — should always be null.
knownFailureModes.fix: Confirm step-2.5 photoCount code returns null, not from any regex/selector

knownFailureModes.symptom: description empty when it shouldn't be (Express has one)
knownFailureModes.cause: Either CAPTCHA blocked Search KP OR selectors changed
knownFailureModes.fix: Run diag-search-knowledge-panel.mjs (fresh profile) to find current selectors
